mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lottery_item WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM lottery_item WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM lottery_item WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 AND pity_threshold IS NOT NULL AND pity_threshold > 0 ORDER BY pity_threshold ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lottery_item (parent_id, name, probability, status, pity_threshold, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{probability}, #{status}, #{pityThreshold, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
